# opnsense_quagga_ospf_prefix_list (Data Source)

Configure OSPF prefix lists.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `action` (String) Set permit for match or deny to negate the rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this prefix list.
- `name` (String) The name of this prefix list.
- `network` (String) The network to match.
- `sequence_number` (String) The sequence number.
